Our Way

Not a menu.
A conversation.

"You tell me your favorite candy. I build a dessert around it. That's the whole premise."

Breezy Bakes was built around a single idea: the most memorable food experiences come from someone who truly listened. We don't do off-the-shelf. We design every menu around your story — whether that's a birthday party, a wedding, or a dinner you want people to talk about for years.

01

Tell us everything

Your memories, your flavors, your theme. The more specific, the better we translate it into food.

02

We design your menu

A curated selection of desserts and/or savory bites created specifically for your event.

03

You receive the illustration

An original ink and watercolor sketch of your creation — a keepsake of the moment.

The Bakes

What we make

Inquire

How can we be
part of your event?

Every menu we create is built entirely around you — your occasion, your flavors, your vision. Whether you're planning an intimate dinner or a large celebration, we'd love to hear what you have in mind and explore how we can bring it to life.

Tell us about your event
Packages

Every occasion,
a perfect fit.

All packages include a complimentary consultation, a customized initial proposal, and a detailed service estimate. Optional add-ons are available, including illustrated menu cards, custom signage, event coordination, and guided tasting experiences.

Starter
The Intimate
Up to 20 guests
  • 1-hour flavor consultation
  • 2 custom dessert items
  • Elegant plating & packaging
  • Local delivery included
Most Popular
The Celebration
20–75 guests
  • Full menu design consultation
  • 4–5 custom dessert & savory items
  • Themed presentation & styling
  • Illustrated digital menu card (add-on)
  • Local delivery & setup
Signature
The Experience
75–200+ guests
  • Immersive concept development
  • Full sweet & savory event menu
  • Guided tasting session (add-on)
  • Printed illustrated menu cards (add-on)
  • Full delivery, setup & styling
  • Day-of coordination support (add-on)

Pricing is provided as part of your customized estimate following your initial consultation.

The Method

Architectural
detail, for cake.

Every dish starts as an ink sketch with watercolor. It's how we think — through layers, proportions, components, and presentation. The drawing is a working document before it's ever a keepsake.

01

The Brief

We sit with the client's parameters — flavor memories, visual references, the emotional register of the event. Every detail is a design input.

02

The Sketch

Before any ingredient is sourced, the dish is drawn. Ink first — line weight matters. Then watercolor wash, layer by layer, color mixing wet-on-wet.

03

The Construction

The sketch becomes the blueprint. Dimensions, layers, garnish placement — it all maps from the illustration to the actual dish.

04

The Keepsake

After the event, the original illustration belongs to the client. It's yours — framed, photographed, or handed to a daughter who cried happy tears.

Mousse · Layer diagram
Cheesecake · Component study
Chocolate Mousse · Construction
Caramel Corn · Texture study
